resources.string: Configure what happens each time you activate the rotation from tile or volume button:
Automatically dismisses Quick Settings when the tile is tapped.
Applies a different brightness level when switching orientation.
Press volume down 5 times quickly to toggle rotation without opening Quick Settings.
Press volume up 5 times quickly to awake the default vocal assistant.

This app needs the Modify system settings permission to control screen rotation and brightness.\n\n
Tap Continue to open the permission screen, then enable the toggle for this app.

Since this app was installed outside the Play Store, Android restricts access to the Accessibility service.


Follow these steps to unlock it:


1. Open your phone's Settings → Apps → App Management → MirrorMate → Tap the ⋮ three-dot menu → "Allow restricted settings"


⚠️ If the ⋮ menu doesn't appear: → Click on "Open Accessibility" → Downloaded Apps → Tap "Volume Trigger" — a "Restricted setting" popup will appear and tap OK → Then go to Settings → Apps → App Management → MirrorMate → The ⋮ menu will now appear on the top right → Tap it → "Allow restricted settings" → You can now come back to this app


2. Once allowed, you can set the volume triggers.
Go to Settings → Accessibility → Downloaded Apps → tap Volume Trigger and enable it.\n\n Once enabled, come back here — the checkbox will activate automatically.
Listens for volume down button presses to trigger rotation actions
